mapper.select: SELECT id, layer_id, shadow_enabled, shadow_x, shadow_y, shadow_blur, shadow_color, glow_enabled, glow_size, glow_color, border_enabled, border_width, border_color, border_style, brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, perspective_enabled, perspective_x, perspective_y, preset_effect, created_at, updated_at FROM ad_layer_effect WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, layer_id, shadow_enabled, shadow_x, shadow_y, shadow_blur, shadow_color, glow_enabled, glow_size, glow_color, border_enabled, border_width, border_color, border_style, brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, perspective_enabled, perspective_x, perspective_y, preset_effect, created_at, updated_at FROM ad_layer_effect WHERE layer_id = #{layerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ad_layer_effect ( layer_id, shadow_enabled, shadow_x, shadow_y, shadow_blur, shadow_color, glow_enabled, glow_size, glow_color, border_enabled, border_width, border_color, border_style, brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, perspective_enabled, perspective_x, perspective_y, preset_effect ) VALUES ( #{layerId}, #{shadowEnabled}, #{shadowX}, #{shadowY}, #{shadowBlur}, #{shadowColor}, #{glowEnabled}, #{glowSize}, #{glowColor}, #{borderEnabled}, #{borderWidth}, #{borderColor}, #{borderStyle}, #{brightness}, #{contrast}, #{saturation}, #{blur}, #{perspectiveEnabled}, #{perspectiveX}, #{perspectiveY}, #{presetEffect} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ad_layer_effect SET shadow_enabled = #{shadowEnabled}, shadow_x = #{shadowX}, shadow_y = #{shadowY}, shadow_blur = #{shadowBlur}, shadow_color = #{shadowColor}, glow_enabled = #{glowEnabled}, glow_size = #{glowSize}, glow_color = #{glowColor}, border_enabled = #{borderEnabled}, border_width = #{borderWidth}, border_color = #{borderColor}, border_style = #{borderStyle}, brightness = #{brightness}, contrast = #{contrast}, saturation = #{saturation}, blur = #{blur}, perspective_enabled = #{perspectiveEnabled}, perspective_x = #{perspectiveX}, perspective_y = #{perspectiveY}, preset_effect = #{presetEffect} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ad_layer_effect WHERE layer_id IN (SELECT id FROM ad_layer WHERE page_id = #{pageId})
